description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of glass for windows and balcony railings. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white exterior, complemented by green landscaping and several trees around the property. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a spacious balcony above. The rear of the house opens to a large backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and additional green space. Multiple large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and views of the surrounding gardens. The property is enclosed by a low wall and includes a driveway and garage on one side.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, and landscaped gardens, including a pool and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, upper balcony, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a large expanse of lawn with minimal windows on this facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and extensive glass windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more garden space, visible pool, and a clear look at the house's flat roof and balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and glass doors in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, covered porch, and a modern door flanked by large glass panels
